drills.title: Passive Voice Part 2 — Future & Modals — Speaking Set 1

sentences.english: This work will be completed tomorrow.
sentences.hindi: यह काम कल पूरा किया जाएगा।
sentences.pronunciation: this work will be completed tomorrow

sentences.english: This problem can be solved.
sentences.hindi: इस समस्या को हल किया जा सकता है।
sentences.pronunciation: this problem can be solved

sentences.english: This rule should be followed.
sentences.hindi: यह नियम पालन किया जाना चाहिए।
sentences.pronunciation: this rule should be followed

drills.title: Passive Voice Part 2 — Future & Modals — Speaking Set 2

sentences.english: This form must be filled.
sentences.hindi: यह फॉर्म भरा जाना चाहिए।
sentences.pronunciation: this form must be filled

sentences.english: This letter will be sent tomorrow.
sentences.hindi: यह letter कल भेजा जाएगा।
sentences.pronunciation: this letter will be sent tomorrow

sentences.english: This mistake can be corrected.
sentences.hindi: इस गलती को सुधारा जा सकता है।
sentences.pronunciation: this mistake can be corrected

drills.title: Passive Voice Part 2 — Future & Modals — Speaking Set 3

sentences.english: This decision should be taken quickly.
sentences.hindi: यह decision जल्दी लिया जाना चाहिए।
sentences.pronunciation: this decision should be taken quickly

sentences.english: This information must be kept secret.
sentences.hindi: यह जानकारी गुप्त रखी जानी चाहिए।
sentences.pronunciation: this information must be kept secret

sentences.english: This project will be started next month.
sentences.hindi: यह project अगले महीने शुरू किया जाएगा।
sentences.pronunciation: this project will be started next month

drills.title: Passive Voice Part 2 — Future & Modals — Speaking Set 4

sentences.english: This question can be asked easily.
sentences.hindi: यह सवाल आसानी से पूछा जा सकता है।
sentences.pronunciation: this question can be asked easily

sentences.english: This book should be read.
sentences.hindi: यह किताब पढ़ी जानी चाहिए।
sentences.pronunciation: this book should be read

sentences.english: This rule must be known to everyone.
sentences.hindi: यह नियम सभी को पता होना चाहिए।
sentences.pronunciation: this rule must be known to everyone

drills.title: Passive Voice Part 2 — Future & Modals — Speaking Set 5

sentences.english: This meeting will be called next week.
sentences.hindi: यह मीटिंग अगले हफ्ते बुलाई जाएगी।
sentences.pronunciation: this meeting will be called next week

sentences.english: This can be made better.
sentences.hindi: इसे बेहतर बनाया जा सकता है।
sentences.pronunciation: this can be made better

sentences.english: This notice should be read by every student.
sentences.hindi: हर student को यह notice पढ़ना चाहिए।
sentences.pronunciation: this notice should be read by every student

drills.title: Passive Voice Part 2 — Future & Modals — Speaking Set 6

sentences.english: This work must be completed on time.
sentences.hindi: यह काम समय पर पूरा किया जाना चाहिए।
sentences.pronunciation: this work must be completed on time

sentences.english: The new policy will be implemented next year.
sentences.hindi: नई policy अगले साल लागू की जाएगी।
sentences.pronunciation: the new policy will be implemented next year

sentences.english: This issue can be discussed.
sentences.hindi: इस मुद्दे पर चर्चा की जा सकती है।
sentences.pronunciation: this issue can be discussed

drills.title: Passive Voice Part 2 — Future & Modals — Speaking Set 7

sentences.english: Every rule should be followed.
sentences.hindi: हर नियम का पालन किया जाना चाहिए।
sentences.pronunciation: every rule should be followed

sentences.english: This responsibility must be taken.
sentences.hindi: यह जिम्मेदारी उठाई जानी चाहिए।
sentences.pronunciation: this responsibility must be taken
